steps.title: Apply the vertical shift
steps.content:
Shifting a graph up by $8$ units adds $8$ to every output.
$$
g(x)=f(x)+8
$$

steps.title: Substitute the function
steps.content:
Use $f(x)=4x+7$ in the shifted function.
$$
g(x)=(4x+7)+8
$$
$$
g(x)=4x+7+8
$$

steps.title: Match the shifted equation
steps.content: The equation that adds $8$ to $f(x)$ is $g(x)=4x+7+8$. The answer is A.
